title: WigWag Art & Music Festival
location: Avondale Estates Arts District, Washington St, Avondale Estates, GA
description: 5th annual festival with live music (Blair Crimmins and the Hookers), local art vendors, food trucks, and community vibes. Free to attend — perfect for couples who love exploring local arts scenes together. Bring a blanket and make a day of it.

title: Comedy & Candles Rooftop Night: Love In The Dark
location: REVERB Hotel Rooftop, 770 NE Atlanta Ave, Atlanta, GA 30306
description: Stand-up comedy on the REVERB Hotel rooftop combined with candle making. Intimate, fun, and genuinely romantic — not your typical bar date. Presented by HYPERS CLUB. Tickets tend to sell out fast.

title: ATL Bachatuesdays at Academy Ballroom
location: Academy Ballroom Atlanta, 6250 Lake Dr, Atlanta, GA
description: Weekly salsa and bachata social dance night. Great way for couples to learn to dance together or show off moves. All skill levels welcome — beginners can pick up the basics quickly. energetic crowd, good music, and a fun late-night vibe.

title: Atlanta Cinco De Mayo Latin Night
location: Brimstone Restaurant & Tavern, 27500 Round One Blvd, Alpharetta, GA
description: Cinco de Mayo celebration with Latin music, dancing, and Mexican cuisine. Salsa, bachata, merengue on multiple floors. Food, drinks, and dancing — a complete date night package.

title: Lila Iké Live at The Masquerade
location: The Masquerade (The Loft), 1374 West Peachtree St NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Jamaican reggae star Lila Iké brings her captivating voice to Atlanta. Intimate venue (The Loft) makes for a great couple's night out — great acoustics, good cocktails, and no massive arena crowds. Perfect for music lovers who want something special.

title: Bruce Bruce Live at City Winery
location: City Winery Atlanta, 987 Memorial Dr SE, Atlanta, GA
description: Legendary comedian Bruce Bruce delivers his signature high-energy stand-up at City Winery. Wine, laughs, and a great date night atmosphere. Shows fill up quickly — couples who love comedy will have a blast.

title: Rickey Smiley Special Event at Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, 1157 Euclid Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30307
description: TV personality and comedian Rickey Smiley brings his hilarious stand-up to Atlanta. Helium is the city's best comedy club — intimate, great sightlines, good food and drinks. Friday and Saturday shows available.

title: Unbound Narratives: Embodied Language
time: Exhibition runs through May 17; check website for hours
location: Atlanta Contemporary, 92 Georgia Ave SE, Atlanta, GA 30312
description: Group exhibition exploring embodied language through diverse artistic expressions. Perfect cultural date — couples can wander through galleries together, then grab coffee at the on-site café. Free admission makes this an easy, low-cost date idea.

title: AfroVibez 2026: 5th Annual Africa Day Celebration
location: MOWA (Museum of West African Art), Atlanta
description: Annual Africa Day Celebration with Afrobeat music, African art, food, and cultural performances. Celebrates the diaspora through music and art — a vibrant, energetic event perfect for couples who love Afrobeat and want to experience something culturally rich.

title: Jim Breuer: Find The Funny at Buckhead Theatre
location: Buckhead Theatre, 3110 Roswell Rd NE, Atlanta, GA 30305
description: Legendary comedian Jim Breuer (SNL, Half Baked) brings his 'Find The Funny' tour to Atlanta. Great production value, full theatre experience — couples who enjoy comedy will love this bigger venue experience with solid laughs.

title: R.A.S Memorial Weekend: 100% Reggae Afrobeat Soca
location: Underground Atlanta, 50 Lower Alabama St SW, Atlanta, GA 30303
description: Memorial Weekend party with pure reggae, Afrobeat, and soca music. Late-night party perfect for couples who love to dance. Underground Atlanta is a unique venue with a lively atmosphere — great for letting loose together.

title: Reggae Fest Massive ATL — Mavado, Busy Signal, Beenie Man & More
location: State Farm Arena, 1 State Farm Dr, Atlanta, GA 30303
description: Huge reggae fest featuring Mavado, Busy Signal, Beenie Man, Spice, Elephant Man, and more. State Farm Arena turns into an island party — great for couples who love reggae and want to experience a big concert together. Food, drinks, and non-stop vibes.
